title: trachymene humilis
intro: Trachymene humilis, also known as the dwarf caraway or coast caraway, is a small shrub native to Australia that belongs to the carrot family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding digestion. Trachymene humilis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
